## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm typecheck:cli` pass
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (added/updated tests for behavior changes)
- [ ] `pnpm build` (and `pnpm build:cli` if the CLI changed) succeeds
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing
- [ ] Updated docs where relevant
